# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Conventional Changelog](https://github.com/conventional-changelog/conventional-changelog-config-spec/blob/master/versions/2.2.0/README.md),
and this project adheres to [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).

## [v0.1.5](https://github.com/liblaf/nox-recipes/releases/tag/v0.1.5) - 2026-03-31

### 🐛 Bug Fixes

- harden nox helpers and publish API docs - [87e0f6f](https://github.com/liblaf/nox-recipes/commit/87e0f6f1be19b680a4a1a316da3e00cf4d152264) by [@liblaf](https://github.com/liblaf)

### 📝 Documentation

- refresh README and documentation links - [129a78f](https://github.com/liblaf/nox-recipes/commit/129a78f3b9e784bed36cbb139b633df45b4aaf13) by [@liblaf](https://github.com/liblaf)

### ♻️ Code Refactoring

- import attach_stub directly in package init - [ba5b30a](https://github.com/liblaf/nox-recipes/commit/ba5b30a5d55ff346dcf2c2be066beb800d612b15) by [@liblaf](https://github.com/liblaf)

### 🛠 Builds

- **(docs)** migrate site generation to zensical - [13a7a4a](https://github.com/liblaf/nox-recipes/commit/13a7a4ac63cf69b0826639faca3550d6f4d2f52e) by [@liblaf](https://github.com/liblaf)
